checkin.journal:
It was an easy day. I wasn't really being super productive, and he got the hyperbaric chamber. That was kinda cool. I also did the red light therapy, I went to the bioresonance, so I was trying to heal my body. But fun fact is that somehow in the process I got more pain in my area, so it could be haemorrhoids.
Bloating was on the level of 5 out of 10, outside maybe 4, but it was pretty noticeable from 6-9pm
